title: Portfolio Architecture Update
content: Started the process of migrating the old portfolio to a modern React frontend with Tailwind CSS to ensure it looks crisp on high DPI screens and boasts improved performance.

title: Venn diagram and 'circles'
content:
This night, I was studying something related to Venn Diagrams. I had to search for a 4-set Venn Diagram, but suddenly gone through this following article by Danyal Tairoski in Medium titled "Why you can’t make a Venn Diagram with 4 Circles". Firstly when I Googled, being just impatient to read full explanation in Google's AI mode i got a picture of 4-set Venn Diagram. Having the diagram, i did an inspection for different regions but when I tried to search for the UNION formula again, I have got this detailed explanation. I was amazed how elegant the article was. And for sure now I can say that I got to know why we can't have a 4-Set's Venn Diagram with circles but definitely with Ellipse.

Rijaul,
Chirakhundi, 16th April'26
